# PR.AT-03 PR.AT-03

> **Subcategory of:** Awareness and Training (PR.AT)

## High-Level Description

**Function:** PROTECT (PR)
**Framework:** NIST Cybersecurity Framework v2.0

Third-party stakeholders (e.g., suppliers, customers, partners) understand their roles and responsibilities

## What to Check

- [ ] Verify PR.AT-03 PR.AT-03 outcome is achieved
- [ ] Review documentation and evidence for PR.AT-03
- [ ] Assess organizational maturity for PROTECT function
- [ ] Map to SP 800-53 controls that satisfy PR.AT-03

## How to Test

### Step 1: Identify Current Profile

Determine the organization's current and target CSF profile tier for PR.AT-03.

### Step 2: Assess Outcome Achievement

```
# Review organizational policies and procedures
# Check for evidence that PR.AT-03 outcome is met
# Interview stakeholders responsible for PROTECT
```

### Step 3: Map to Technical Controls

Identify which SP 800-53 controls implement this CSF outcome and verify their operating effectiveness.

## Tools

| Tool            | Purpose                       | Usage                        |
| --------------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| cloud-audit-mcp | Assess cloud security posture | `cloud_audit_*` tools        |
| Manual Review   | Policy and procedure review   | Interviews and documentation |

## Remediation Guide

Achieve the PR.AT-03 PR.AT-03 outcome:

Third-party stakeholders (e.g., suppliers, customers, partners) understand their roles and responsibilities

## Risk Assessment

| Finding                                | Severity | Impact               |
| -------------------------------------- | -------- | -------------------- |
| PR.AT-03 PR.AT-03 outcome not achieved | High     | PROTECT Function Gap |

- [ ] Target profile tier defined
- [ ] Gap analysis completed
- [ ] SP 800-53 control mapping verified
- [ ] Implementation roadmap exists
